channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran war 're-escalation risks' keep oil prices volatile as talks falter
item.description: Oil prices remain unstable due to Iran war 're-escalation risks,' as Tehran says it has shared another set of revised peace terms with the U.S.

item.title: Cassidy loses; Trump-backed Letlow and Fleming head to runoff, AP projects
item.description: Incumbent Senator Bill Cassidy faced Trump-backed Representative Julia Letlow and State Treasurer John Fleming.

item.title: Gunman kills six and wounds eight in latest shooting rampage in Turkey
item.description: A man with a rifle attacked multiple locations, killing at least six people and wounding eight others, according to Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

item.title: American doctor working in Congo tests positive for Ebola
item.description: An American medical missionary in the Democratic Republic of the Congo has a confirmed case of Ebola and is being transported to Germany for treatment.
